description_for_human: ERP No-Code 100% gratuit pour PME. Generez votre logiciel de gestion depuis des fichiers YAML.
description_for_model: AZALPLUS is a French No-Code ERP platform that is 100% free. It generates complete business management systems (CRM, invoicing, inventory, HR, projects, accounting) from simple YAML configuration files. Key features: 67 pre-built modules, multi-tenant architecture, RGPD compliant, electronic signatures, AI-powered autocompletion, workflow engine. Target market: French SMBs (TPE/PME). Unique business model: ERP is free, revenue from financial services. Technical stack: Python FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis.
